description: eSky is an online travel booking platform for flights, flight-and-hotel packages, stays, and related travel products. It also operates an affiliate partner program with integrations for embedding package search and routing users to eSky booking results.
summary: eSky exposes a public no-auth MCP server at `https://mcp.esky.com/mcpgpttc` and an affiliate-focused HTTP integration surface for portfolio search/results and autocomplete that uses an eSky-issued Partner ID in query parameters.

surfaces.name: eSky Portfolio Results & Search Form API
